backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce the new baseline.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin with explicit mainClass and classifier to match the new package structure.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without specifying the mainClass, the plugin might fail to identify the entry point if multiple candidates exist or if the default scanning logic doesn't align with the new com.kood package structure.
